title: Yaaro Ival Lyrics Thirumanam Ennum Nikkah Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Singers: Yazin Nizar
Music: M.Ghibran
Movie: Thirumanam Ennum Nikkah
Lyrics: Parvathy

Yaaro ival yaaro ival
kandae manam thikkaadho.
sorkkal ellaam sikki kondae
thondai kuzhi vikkaadho.

Ennenna pesa eppadi pesa
oththigai paarthaeney.
punnagai pookka pathiramaaga
semiththu vaithaeney.

Indru booomiyil pookkum vanavil vannam
kanmuney kandaache..
Adhil sannalai konjam
unnudan serthaal enmanam undaache..

Yedho oru yedho oru
maayam kandaen enmunney.
unmai endru thondrum varai
paarthu kondae nindraeney.

Eppadi pesa ullathai veesa
yosithu paartheney.
Inimel indha paadhai eppadi sellum
solidamaataayaa..

Meley podum ilai thirai
thaandi ennai parpaaya.
Sattena paaidhidum saththathai
vittutu enmanam osayai ketpaayaa.

Yedho sonnaaaley...
nesam dhegam vittu sellum
vazhvai paarthu ellum
neeril kottram kanda
meni pola thullum ....(Yaaro ival)

Neeya idhu naana idhu
ennae oru poraattam.
vedangal kalaindhu aattangal mudindhu
endraikku kidaikkum vellottam.
novellaam ....
poividumaa....

Idhu manam konda kurai
edhu varai arai vali
vidamattum thittu thittaai karai.

Yaaro ival yaaro ival
kandae manam thikkaadho.
sorkkal ellaam sikki kondae
thondai kuzhi vikkaadho.

Eppadi pesa ullathai veesa
yosithu paartheney.
oh moththamaai naaney karandhu pogm
nilai kandaney.
Inimel indha paadhai eppadi sellum
solidamaataayaa..

adadaa indha mounam .. kollum
nee vandhu meetpaayaa..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Yaaro Ival?

The song Yaaro Ival expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the beauty of romantic relationships.

What is the plot context of Thirumanam Ennum Nikkah related to this song?

This song plays a significant role in Thirumanam Ennum Nikkah, highlighting the romantic journey of the lead characters.

Who is the singer of Yaaro Ival?

The song is sung by the talented artist Yazin, known for his soulful renditions.

Who composed the music for Yaaro Ival?

The music for Yaaro Ival was composed by M Ghibran, who is celebrated for his unique soundscapes.

When was Yaaro Ival released?

Yaaro Ival was released on January 2, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yaaro Ival, the protagonist expresses his feelings of love and admiration, creating a romantic atmosphere that resonates throughout the film. The soothing melody, combined with heartfelt lyrics, evokes a sense of longing and joy. This song beautifully encapsulates the essence of love, making it a perfect fit for weddings and anniversaries. The collaboration of Yazin's vocals and M Ghibran's composition results in a memorable listening experience that lingers in the heart.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yaaro Ival from Thirumanam Ennum Nikkah is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love. With Yazin's soulful voice and M Ghibran's enchanting composition, this song resonates with anyone who has experienced the magic of romance. Dive into the heartfelt lyrics penned by Parvathi that elevate this track to a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: Yazin Nizar sings this song, composed by M.Ghibran for the movie Thirumanam Ennum Nikkah, with lyrics by Parvathy.
Who is she, who is she, does my heart not feel? Are all the words just a pile of dirt?
How do I speak, how do I speak, I have seen the way. I have kept a smile like a flower blooming.
Today in this world, the colors of the sky have appeared. If I join with you, my heart feels alive.
I have seen some magic, I have seen something strange. I stood there, looking at the truth that emerges.
I thought about how to express what’s inside me. Now, how will this path move forward?
The leaves above will cover me, will you come and see? Leaving behind the truth that will break my heart.
If something is said... love will leave the body, and looking at life, everything will jump like a fish in water... (Who is she?)
You are this, I am that, it’s a struggle for me. The mix of worlds and the end of games will bring a new beginning. Will everything just go away...?
This is a heart-wrenching pain that will not leave until it is resolved, it will hit and hit again.
Who is she, who is she, does my heart not feel? Are all the words just a pile of dirt?
I thought about how to express what’s inside me. Oh, I have seen my state of being lost. Now, how will this path move forward?
Oh, this silence... will you come and meet me?
